case_title: ELLER, F. PAUL VS. SOMA NETWORKS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLER, F. PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA NETWORKS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLER, F. PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOMA NETWORKS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $305,494.20 PRINCIPAL, $2,081.92 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $307,986.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
